notes: Converted from the latest uploaded Excel workbook.
Weighted score fields contain broken references in the workbook, so raw score and KPI values are preserved.

weeklyInspections.Top_3_Gaps_Observed:
1. Leadership failure
2. Poor supervision
3. Poor sub-contractor control
4. PTW failure
weeklyInspections.Immediate_Action_Taken: Unsafe work practices were suspended immediately. The CM of the cluster was called but he refused to visit the location.
weeklyInspections.Preventive_Action_Required:
1. PTW must be controlled by the main contractor.
2. Close supervision of sub-contractors by main contractor shall be ensured.
3. Non-performing subcontractors shall not be paid and shall be removed from project.
4. Non-performing construction team shall be replaced without delays
weeklyInspections.Action_Owner:
1-3rd recommendation by the cluster CM
4th recommendation by the PD.

weeklyInspections.Immediate_Action_Taken: The team was commended for their visible leadership in driving transformation at Cluster 8A.
weeklyInspections.Preventive_Action_Required:
The Construction Manager and his team were advised to ensure that sub-contractors do not mess up with their site. The following advise was given:
1. No payment for work if site condition is below the acceptable standard.
2. Close supervision of sub-contractors by the construction team of the main contractor.
3. Housekeeping shall be maintined for all shift.
4. Provide a temporary storage area for waste for each villa.
5. PTW shall remain under the control of the main contractor.
weeklyInspections.Action_Owner:
Construction Manager of Cluster 8A 
HSE Manager of TAJV

Weekly_Dashboard: Set the control week and month in blue-font cells. This sheet summarizes weekly and current month performance by cluster and highlights weak KPIs / root causes.
Monthly_Dashboard: Set the selected month and previous month in blue-font cells. Use this view for monthly recognition and improvement review.
Gap_Analysis: Use the control week and month to identify recurring gaps, weak KPIs and likely root causes. This supports weekly corrective and preventive action planning.
CAPA_Tracker: Automated from Weekly_Inspections. Each inspection row with a recorded gap/action appears here automatically. Close Date can be updated manually if you want to mark an action closed.
